name: server_connector
description: Placeholder — connects this desktop Athena to a future online Athena server for heavy inference, background jobs, and multi-device sync (see docs/SERVER_ROADMAP.md).

settings.auth: token stored in env / OS credential manager, never here

tools.name: sync_memory
tools.description: Sync memory across devices via the server.
